# Ticket #2: [Feature] Multi-Page PDF Splitting & Stitching

## Type
`feature`, `enhancement`

## Description
When scanning batches of documents, multiple receipts or contracts often end up in a single multi-page PDF scan. Users need a visual tool to split pages into separate documents or merge separate scans into one.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Visual thumbnail page grid editor in the document detail modal.
- [ ] Drag-and-drop page reordering.
- [ ] "Split Here" action creating two independent document records.
- [ ] Multi-select document action "Merge into single PDF".
- [ ] Preserve original file hash audit logs.
